resources.string: 1. Select a Cake or Cookie image
2. What would you like to ask?
Enter custom prompt or select a quick chip below...
Provide a detailed recipe for this sweet treat, including the step-by-step instructions, ingredients, and baking temperature.
Give a creative, appetizing, and catchy name for this cake or cookie, along with a short, poetic description.
Analyze this image and estimate the caloric content and main nutritional values per serving, with a friendly tip.
List the visible ingredients and decoration toppings used in this dessert, pointing out potential allergens.
No recent analyses yet. Ask Gemini something!
